reviews.review_description: I’ve practiced dozens of impromptu speeches in here in an attempt to stop saying so many filler words when I speak. It’s working! Also, modifying the AI avatars is so funny. I’ve got them saying all sorts of whacky things. The crazy part is that I’ve noticed actually, everyday improvement in my speech. Less filler words, better sentence structure, improved focus on people’s questions.

reviews.review_title: Toastmaster approved!!! ovation VR is an
reviews.review_description:
⸻

I’ve had a great experience using the Ovation VR app so far. It’s been a powerful tool for improving my public speaking, especially when it comes to maintaining eye contact and thinking on my feet during debates or impromptu speaking.

One thing that really stood out to me is the support from the CEO, Jeff Marshall. He personally helped me navigate the app when I needed it, which says a lot about the level of care behind this product.

As a Toastmaster, I’m always looking for ways to improve, and this app gives me a realistic, practical way to practice and build confidence. I’m excited to keep using it and continue developing my skills.

I truly believe Ovation VR is going to be a game changer in my journey as a speaker.

reviews.review_title: Great for speaking voice! Social Anxiety
reviews.review_description: I use this mostly for social anxiety and confidence while speaking to people in every day situations. It's been great for that!  There's a prompt box so you can customize a ton about the interaction including how the AI reacts, their personality, tone, brevity etc. Lots of great features and their customer support is responsive and friendly.

All I can say is wow love this , have spoken to devs vie email real nice guy, I look forward to some great updates, if you need to test your interview skills , or need to promote a product, this is great the ai are real good , in future hope we can have a avatar creator or change clothing on the ones that come with it, will be fab when that gets introduced, fingers crossed , and a pass through mode would  be very welcoming as I have seen other programs on this platform that have it already;) 
Over all it’s a great platform to build confidence etc , well done devs team ;)
If you are preparing for an important presentation, and if you struggle with  anxiety related to speaking, this is the medicine. So smart, and works super well. I use it all the time.
Good app to get a bit of speaking practice. Doesn't show up in your Meta subscriptions so keep in mind when your free trial expires..

reviews.review_title: This is what VR was made for
reviews.review_description: Have used similar VR tools before but Ovation's much better monthly value just smokes the competition. Originally I thought I was a good public speaker but just struggling with inconsistency but a couple of months grinding away with OvationVR has brought me to a level I wasn't even aware of. Feedback is on point and the mix of scenarios mean you can take a break from the more standard public speaking scenarios in the more fun stuff like debates and interrogations. Really looking forward to the new Cross-Examination and Business Pitching scenario's being release shortly, literally can't wait!!

I find the app very useful to prepare and rehearse my presentations and speeches.  This is an excellent platform which not only gives me a very good VR environment to deliver your speech, but backs up it up with AI generated feedback, recordings and the transcript of your speech. The AI generated feedback is quite good. It has given me many realistic pointers towards improving my speech delivery over the last few months.   Reading the transcript and watching the recording give me opportunities to assess the impact of my own speech as an audience.   I know for sure that my speaking skills have improved ever since I started using this software.  I feel I am able to structure my speech better, avoid filler words and speak more objectively than before.

I do want to mention that, indeed, a few times I have faced some minor technical glitches. Invariably, they have were addressed within a few hours.

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to write this review. We're delighted that Ovation has improved your speaking skills. Please don't hesitate to reach out to us directly at support@ovationvr.com if you experience more glitches in the future. As you mentioned, we do our best to resolve them as quickly as possible.

reviews.review_description: This is arguably the best app I've ever tried for practicing presentation or learining languages. Unfortunatly, in less than four days, I used up app my credits for the AI. This app has a huge potential, but with such a tight limit, I can't afford the subscription.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words and your feedback about AI tokens (credits). We released version 2.5 on August 1st, 2025, which significantly reduces token use in most scenarios, and we will continue to improve that in future updates. We also expect AI token costs from ChatGPT to drop in the coming months, and we plan to pass those savings on to our customers in the form of higher token limits. Stay tuned.

reviews.review_title: Look like a lot of paid comments
reviews.review_description:
Don’t be fooled very expensive. This application allows you to use its artificial intelligent features by giving you 1 million tokens per month. Don’t be fooled by this number because I use the 1 million tokens in less than an hour once exhausted subscribers will be unable to use any of the features until tokens are replenished That will be on the first of the following month. App will  be useless until then too expensive for that.
Edited ￼ if you go to FAQs on ovations website, #10 it will clearly shows you where it states individuals will receive 1 million tokens per month, second 1 hour may have been a little overstated, but it was definitely in one day I finished those tokens. ￼
Also, you spoke about a 20 minute speech is about 25k tokens, but it’s when you’re interacting with the AI that’s where you really adding up those tokens it’s when they or it speak!

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback. I want to address a few things for others who might see this review. First, subscribers receive 2 million monthly tokens, not 1 million. Second, using 1 million tokens in an hour is not possible. For example, a 20-minute speech with a Q&A session amounts to roughly 25,000 tokens. In other words, you could practice 80 20-minute speeches in Ovation in a month. Third, token prices are falling rapidly, and as they do, we will continue to increase the number of monthly tokens available to our customers. Most importantly, Ovation provides a 7-day free trial for new subscribers. During that trial, it's very easy to see how many tokens you use during your sessions, letting you decide before you are charged whether $20/month is a good value.

reviews.review_description: I’ve been enjoying using Ovation ever since I’ve done the free trial. Totally worth it considering it helps you gain confidence (and so much more) in planned and unplanned interactions/presentations (I personally use it for a better flow in my day to day conversations). I don’t know why anyone would ever complain about it, one of the best uses of AI so far.

reviews.review_title: The most useful app on Meta Quest
reviews.review_description: This is a brilliant app. It helped me overcome my fear of public speaking and really improve my presentation skills. On top of that, the developers are super active and genuinely listen to user feedback. This is one of those rare apps I’d recommend getting a VR headset just to try—it’s that good!

reviews.review_title: The best integration of VR and AI
reviews.review_description: So many of the apps that integrate AI chatbots with VR feel dystopian and designed to exploit human loneliness. This app is the opposite as if not only helps facilitate a version of social learning, but also has chatbots that are well trained and resourceful in responding to questions or challenges. The capacity of this app is endless as it can be used to generate ideas, talk through theoretical problems, improve linguistic competency, get useful summaries of your ideas spoken back to you, or you can just use it for its advertised use case of practicing public speaking and presentations. I honestly believe the way this app is marketed sells its potential short when it's arguably better understood as a brainstorming and debate app than a rehearsal app. Using with students starting next semester.

reviews.review_title: How do I cancel the membership I didn't
reviews.review_description: I just found out that $20 was attempted to be withdrawn from my account and I didn't even know that I had agreed to join this subscription. It seemed like it would be a useful app if I maybe had more experience using it.

developer_response.body:
Hi @stacy.white.180. To start a 7-day Ovation trial, you must enter your credit card information. Next to that is a notice that your subscription will be activated and your card will be charged at the end of the trial. We also include this information on our website and in our FAQ.

We send email reminders before the trial ends, notifying you about the upcoming charge, and we display the number of days left in your trial every time you sign into the application and website. 

Canceling the trial is as simple as signing into your account, going to the billing page, and selecting "Cancel Now."

We hope to see you back someday.

reviews.review_description: Great app to get better at Public speaking but it is very frustrating to use as you have to either enter your username and password every time you use it, which gets very frustrating overtime.

developer_response.body: Thanks @Jackinvan. On the same menu where you enter your username and password is a checkbox labeled "Remember". If you check that, you will not need to enter your username and password each time.

reviews.review_description:
This is the best app. So realistic, really effective at helping me practice in a "real" situation.
The AI feedback is incredible too with suggestions to help you improve and scoring to monitor measured improvements.

reviews.review_title: Will be a mainstay For my everyday.
reviews.review_description:
Thanks 🙏🏿 to Alex Lyons for recommending this great app on YouTube. Its like being able to spam a real life Orator Coach who gives you real life expert feedback with details. 

needs a video playback option on mobile devices.
Enjoying the app. It is amazing how real it feels.

reviews.review_title: Ovation Is Our Learners' Top Choice
reviews.review_description:
As a learning institution in Australia, we needed a versatile app related to ESL and VET content. Ovation’s trailblazing use of GenAI offers seamless, hyper-realistic communication with AI-driven avatars that are capable of what some would call “instantiation” — multiple AI characters communicating and processing information with you and with each other. We were blown away by how much we’ve learned just by simply listening to and interacting with a couple of them!  

The app is multimodal, multiplatform, and supports multiplayer scenarios, creating a unique learning experience. Our students and staff have improved language proficiency, gained confidence, and reduced speaking anxiety. Furthermore, Ovation’s customizable features also enhance reading and listening, providing instant transcript and AI-based performance evaluation. Reviews across publications confirm its superiority over other similar apps. Ultimately, based on our research and experience, we believe that Ovation is the best choice for our learners!

I downloaded the app with low expectations but it really blew my mind. It has everything you need to practise pitching and the QAs from AI characters are just something else. Keep the good work, glad to see apps covering real people needs coming to this space.

reviews.review_title: I tried to subscribe but failed
reviews.review_description: It always give me Code error 1

developer_response.body: Hi Mada, sorry to hear about your difficulty subscribing. Please reach out to us at support@ovationvr.com and we will help you troubleshoot.

reviews.review_description:
I bought this to help my Autistic daughters with social anxiety.  We homeschool so I've added it in as the way they can do presentations and practice public speaking.  Our eldest (13yrs) is terrified of this.  When I first put her in it, she took one look at the people sitting on the chairs (avatars), ran to the back of the auditorium, and tried to wrench the doors open.  They don't open so she had to stay in the room.  With some help from me to calm down she started to wander around.  She began to wander the room, look at the people, poke faces and be silly, occasionally ran behind the tv or other things in the room and then cautiously came out.  Once she relaxed she was able to talk in the room, look in other rooms and try some options.  She attempted some 30 second fun topics.  We haven't tried our own presentations yet but we are working up to using all the options.

I am also a child Therapist and look forward to using this in my work with other kids with similar challenges.

It's a great app.  Looking forward to seeing where they progress it.  More movement from the audience and control over their reactions would be great for tailoring it for people's experiences and anxiety levels.  More environments would be nice too.

Definitely recommend this.

So excited to introduce students to the future of public speaking practice! It's one thing to tell students they need to practice their speeches, it's another to put them in an immersive world where they get real time feedback on pitch, rate, eye contact, and gestures AND their slides and notes are there, too. As a forensics competition coach, I can  coach my students wherever we are using the multiplayer option or debaters can spar, duo partners can practice, and team members can peer coach. The future deserves an Ovation 👏

As an educator, it is difficult to find quality VR apps. OvationVR fills that void. The product can be used for a single or for a group (education or corporate) and now has multiplayer mode with various roles built in. This app has been well thought out and is easy for anyone to use! Highly endorsed. Support is A+.

Looking for a way to improve presentation skills without tying up staff capacity, I came across OvationVR.
The application is very user-friendly, easy to use and gives constructive feedback on his presentation skills in terms of gestures, facial expressions and speech.

It's super realistically designed, customisable and you can upload your own files.

I highly recommend the app to strengthen one's public speaking skills.

Ovation is an innovative VR app that has revolutionized public speaking training, making it accessible, immersive, and, most importantly, effective!! As a professor and a privileged beta tester, I can confidently say that this app is a complete game-changer in my classroom. In training mode, real-time analytics provide feedback during a speech, while review mode offers personalized feedback (e.g., movements, gestures, eye contact), pinpointing specific areas for future improvement. Not only do my students benefit from practicing individually, but we also enjoy the multi-user experience, fostering collaborative learning. When it comes to presenting in front of a live audience (after using Ovation), my students report increased confidence and the ability to captivate listeners by delivering truly impactful presentations. Ovation is a must-have VR app for anyone seeking to master the art of public speaking.

This app is designed super well... and I have been testing VR applications for productivity purposes for a long time. I am also a Toastmaster and can see how this is going to work wonders for speakers to gain meaningful practice with their presentations and speeches! So happy I found this as it is even better than what I could have imagined!

I found Ovation's fully virtual characters realistic and engaging. Ignoring the occasional slip up expected with AI, their interactions and remarks seem natural. With their questions/remarks, they frequently put me on the back foot (it's good to experience this because it can happen in the real world).

Freedom of movement is a major advantage in Ovation. Being able to walk around the stage, approach audience members, and interact with props like a chalkboard makes the experience more immersive and allows you to practice as you would in a real presentation.

That's right. You can walk up to the chalkboard, pick up a piece of chalk, write your name on the chalkboard, throw the chalk onto the floor, then pick up the eraser and erase your name. Or, if you prefer, you can make it a whiteboard with dry erase marker.

You can walk up to the microphone stand, adjust the height of it, and grab the microphone from the stand. Then, you can walk away from the mic stand, still holding the mic. Ovation will (optionally) alert you if you are not speaking into the microphone (if your hand which is holding the mic drops too low).

Ovation's Conversation mode is powerful, letting you prime the virtual audience with context on how to respond, tailoring their reactions to match your practice needs. This is especially useful for testing different scenarios.

In Ovation, after I ask for their names, I can address one audience member by name. She will respond to me when called on.

Unlike alternatives, Ovation is solely focused on being a VR app for public speaking. This dedicated focus allows Ovation to provide a more polished VR experience.

Ovation provides the most complete, realistic VR environment for honing public speaking skills, especially for presenters like me who value audience interaction and movement on stage. The ability to customize the audience and direct their responses is a huge plus.

reviews.review_title: Best Public Speaking App by Far
reviews.review_description: I've tried different public speaking apps and this one blows away the competition.  For starters, the graphics are unrivaled.  The feedback the app offers after a speech  is invaluable if you're trying to improve your public speaking.  The customization is great, from handhelds to various venues to  audience size.  I've also used this app as preparation for Toastmasters speeches and the crowd could not believe my progress.  My secret, Ovation.  The secret is out....

With the latest updates, you can interact with AI-powered audience members and this comes in handy in not only in practicing to deliver a speech or presentation but also to handle Q&A and to prepare for interviews and other conversations.  For example, with conversations, you can choose a topic, the professions, interests, or relationships of the participants in the conversation, and the style and dynamic of the conversation which influences how participants interact and respond to each other and you.  You can even have the AI-powered participants speak like pirates.  OvationVR is way ahead of anyone else in this market that I'm aware of.

reviews.review_title: Great Tool for Public Speaking Phobia
reviews.review_description: The graphics and AI tech in this app definitely make it stand out from most other apps. One can have the immersive experience of talking in front of a large audience without having to do it in real life. This has tremendous potential for those who want to do repeated and controlled exposure experiences from their own home in order to reduce fear of public speaking.

I’m impressed by the attention to detail and the capabilities of the AI-powered audience! Whether you’re looking to master persuasive speaking, ace job interviews, or deliver captivating presentations, Ovation has you covered. I’ve tried all 3 modes so far and will continue to use this tool for practice.

As an executive communications and public speaking coach, I was looking for a VR platform to add to my suite of client services. And I was so impressed by the capabilities of Ovation that I decided to integrate it into my offerings to better serve a growing roster of clients, especially those who struggle with public speaking anxiety.

The biggest benefit for clients is the opportunity to put their learnings into practice in front of realistic audiences. I’ve found Ovation easy to use. As someone who’s a Baby Boomer, I found Ovation refreshingly intuitive. 

Public speaking anxiety is real and can sidetrack a promising career trajectory. Thankfully with Ovation, my executive clients have the opportunity to succeed at the highest levels of business and I couldn’t be prouder! Thank you Ovation.
